experience.description: Lead development of production computer vision models for autonomous driving. Built end-to-end MLOps pipelines with MLflow, Kubeflow, and AWS SageMaker. Reduced inference latency by 40% through model optimization (pruning + quantization).

Developed NLP models for document understanding and information extraction. Implemented Transformer-based architectures for Vietnamese text classification. Deployed models via FastAPI + Docker on AWS ECS.

experience.description: Published 2 papers on efficient object detection. Investigated knowledge distillation techniques for deploying models on edge devices.

projects.name: Real-time Object Detection API
projects.description: Built a real-time object detection service using YOLOv8 + FastAPI. Supports batch inference, model versioning, and auto-scaling on Kubernetes. Achieved 30 FPS on NVIDIA T4 GPU.

projects.name: Vietnamese Text Summarizer
projects.description: Fine-tuned mBART model for Vietnamese abstractive summarization. Trained on 50K news articles with custom tokenizer. Deployed as Telegram bot serving 1K+ daily users.
